name: Gail's Easy Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Velveeta cheese in the top of a double boiler.
2. Remove from heat and add the mayonnaise and horseradish.
3. Mix well.
4. Pour into containers.
5. Refrigerate. Will keep for a long time.
6. Makes nice Christmas gifts if packaged in appropriate containers, such as cheese crocks. Tell recipients to save the container for refills since they are certain to want more!
